Customer Database

How to add site contacts

1. Enter the company and site. 2. Enter one person who receives quotes and their email. 3. Press Add / Update Site Contact. Repeat step 2 for each extra contact at the same site. Accounts email is separate and is used for invoices.

Quote Details

Dictation stopped. On iPhone/Safari, tap inside Rough Scope Notes and use the keyboard microphone if browser dictation is blocked.

Dropbox / Save Folder

Best results: use Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge on Mac for folder selection. Safari may not allow direct folder saving.

Selected Folder: Not selected yet.

Safari may block direct Finder folder selection. If the folder picker does not open, copy this path and use Finder > Go > Go to Folder.

Quote Preview

Manual edit: click directly into the quote preview text below and type changes before printing. Changing quote fields or costing will rebuild the preview.

Standard Costing

Separate labour and materials. Labour can be priced by A/B/C hourly rate, weekday day patterns, weekend day rates, or travel hours. Materials can be material-only with markup, or material plus fitting labour time.

Charge Rates

Default rates: A £49.00, B £57.33, C £66.15. Change A Rate or apply a percentage uplift to keep A, B and C in proportion.

Kensal Conveyor Costing

Based on the Kensal Conveyor Costing Sheet. Yellow-style inputs can be changed; calculated totals update automatically. Use Additional Materials for any extra bought items.

ASHCO Costing / Working Out

Based on the ASHCO costing template. Add rows for labour/material items, lodge, sundry and missed materials; the quote breakdown imports Labour, Materials, Lodge and Total Price separately.

Charge Rates

These use the same A/B/C rates as the rest of the app. Pick A, B or C on each Ashco line instead of typing the hourly rate manually.

Quoted Jobs

Quotes issued or drafted that have not yet become live work. Open any project to view the quote, costing, RAMS and invoice workflow. Use Lost / Delete when a quote has expired, been superseded or is no longer required.

£0.00
RefDateRaised ByCustomerSiteProjectValueStatusActions

Live Work

Accepted jobs currently being worked. Timesheet labour is pulled against the same job/reference number used for the quote, RAMS and invoice. Use Ready To Invoice when the work is complete and ready to bill.

RefCustomerSiteProjectPOValueTimesheet HoursLabour CostInvoicedProfit Est.StatusActions

Admin Job Debug

Shows why jobs do or do not appear in the lads' timesheet job list.

Ready To Invoice

Jobs marked ready for billing but not yet saved as an invoice.

RefCustomerSiteProjectPOValueActions

Completed Jobs

Invoiced/closed project history. Open the project to review the quote, calculations, RAMS and invoice details.

RefInvoiceCustomerSiteProjectValueStatusActions

Risk Assessment & Method Statement

Generate a professional job-specific RAMS from the quote scope or a manual description. The app interprets the work, adds hazards/controls/method steps, then you can manually edit and save it against the quote/job number.

Invoice

Create an invoice from the current quote/job, or use Standalone Invoice when no job has been raised. Printing/saving or emailing an invoice automatically adds it to the register and monthly totals.

Staged / Part Invoice

Use this when a job needs 50% upfront, 50% completion, 30/70, 60/40 or any manual staged payment. Saved invoices are tracked against Our Ref.

Monthly Invoicing

Net: £0.00
Gross: £0.00

Money Due Dashboard

Expected payment dates are calculated from the payment terms saved in Customer Database.

Showing: All customers

Previous Invoices / Tax Year Dashboard 2026/27

Includes invoices raised in this app plus the imported Excel invoice history from 1 April 2026. Use Show Previous Invoices to open the detailed invoice list; the monthly figures and Top Customer table stay visible.

Company Analysis

Commercial dashboard using app invoices, imported invoice history, quoted jobs, live jobs and linked timesheet labour. Sage linking can be added later when GGM confirm the best route.

Live Job Tracker

Workflow: quote drafts stay as quotes. Accepting without a PO/customer instruction marks the job as Accepted Awaiting PO. Only jobs with a PO or clear customer instruction become Live Not Invoiced and appear in the timesheet app.

Labour Charge Rates

These rates are used for job labour costings from timesheet A/B/C hours. Change A manually, or apply a percentage to keep B and C at the same relative uplift.

RefCustomerSiteProjectStatusEstimated LabourTimesheet HoursActual LabourVarianceEmployeesAction

Admin Job Debug

Shows why jobs do or do not appear in the lads' timesheet job list.

Labour Planner

Select a week, then type where each person is working. Approved holidays from the Timesheet app appear automatically and stay locked.

Manual Planner Holiday

Use this if an approved holiday from the Timesheet app has not appeared yet, or for Wayne/David planner holidays. It locks the holiday into the labour planner.

GitHub and your computer use separate browser storage, so use Sync Approved Holidays to pull approved holidays from the timesheet database.

System & Backups

Normal daily use now auto-loads from cloud on login and auto-saves changes. This page is for checking sync status and making safety backups.

Live Cloud Sync

How it works: when Wayne or David logs in, the app checks Supabase for the newest copy. When either of you saves quotes, jobs, invoices, RAMS, calculations or planner changes, the app auto-saves to cloud. If the cloud has changed since this device last loaded it, auto-save pauses instead of silently overwriting the other person.

Cloud sync is waiting for login.

Use Load Latest Cloud Data if the yellow warning says David/Wayne has changed cloud data while this device was open. Dropbox JSON backup remains a safety copy, not the normal way of sharing data.

Automatic App Data Backup

Automatic backup runs once per day when this app is open and a folder can be written to.
